message:
feat(engine): add 200 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Ninth batch of enrichment tests:

- extension_lifecycle_manager: 36 tests (extension states, lifecycle
  transitions, resource budgets, cooperative shutdown, manifests)
- feature_parity_tracker: 44 tests (feature status, ES versions,
  lockstep runtimes, test262 ingestion, release gate evaluation)
- frankenlab_extension_lifecycle: 28 tests (scenario kinds, all 7
  scenario executions, suite results, cross-scenario properties)
- frankenlab_surface_gap_matrix: 47 tests (surface/capability IDs,
  coverage levels, gap cells, surface assessments, matrix operations)
- golden_vectors: 45 tests (hex encoding/decoding, golden vector
  construction, vector sets, JSON field stability, BTreeMap ordering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
